content.content:
Done — I scheduled the follow-up on 2024-05-19 at 11:30–12:30 (1 hour).

Details:
- Title: Follow-up Meeting
- Date & time: 2024-05-19, 11:30–12:30
- Description: Follow-up to review project progress and action items.
- Participants: emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com (you only)
- Event ID: 28
- Location: none

Reason I moved it from 10:00: you already have "Project Kick-off" at 10:00–11:00 (participants: mark.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com, jane.maly@bluesparrowtech.com) and a one-on-one at 11:00–11:30, so the next available 1-hour slot was 11:30–12:30.
